title: calophyllum macrophyllum
intro: Calophyllum macrophyllum, also known as the Kamani tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to the tropical forests of the Pacific Islands, particularly in the Philippines and Fiji. The medicinal properties of Calophyllum macrophyllum include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory diseases. The herbal preparations of Calophyllum macrophyllum include extracts, oils, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
